dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6742 IH: Quantum Leaders Education and Advancement Program Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mrs. Foushee (for herself and Mr. Obernolte) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Science, Space, and Technology

form.official-title: To reauthorize the Next Generation Quantum Leaders Pilot Program of the National Science Foundation for the education and training of the next generation of students and teachers in the fundamental principles of quantum mechanics, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Quantum Leaders Education and Advancement Program Act or the Q–LEAP.

section.header: Reauthorization of Next Generation Quantum Leaders Pilot Program of the National Science Foundation
section.text: Paragraph (5) of section 10661(f) of the Research and Development, Competition, and Innovation Act (Public Law 117–167; relating to the Next Generation Quantum Leaders Pilot Program of the National Science Foundation for the education and training of the next generation of students and teachers in the fundamental principles of quantum mechanics) is amended by striking 2026 and inserting 2028.
